dispatch_policy: Do not create Codex image-generation threads until art approval is granted for asset-index.json and series-art-image-prompts.json.
history_policy: Final approved images write to canonical output paths. Retained non-final candidates must be moved to sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes. Never create v1/, v2/, versions/, or drafts/ directories.

output_format_contract.rule: Thread workers must read each prompt output_format and generate the requested card or board, not a final video frame unless the asset subtype is reference_frame or shot_override.

batches.title: 三势力徽章旗帜基础母版
batches.dependency_reason: Root faction emblem and flag master cards must be approved before style, costume, character, location, prop, ruin, and symbol generation.
batches.retry_policy: After approval, generate 1-3 candidates per asset only when needed; keep one final file at output_path and archive retained alternatives in history/ with version suffixes. These roots must preserve legacy-approved emblem geometry and plan transparent/line-control derivatives separately.

output_format_requirements.alpha_policy: forbidden_for_this_card; transparent emblem, flag-mask, or SVG/PNG line-control layers must be planned separately for exact compositing
required_views: cloth flag or banner application view
seal, patch, armor, or stone application view
scale reference across costume, ruin, and prop use
composition_layers: flag fabric and banner application layer
costume, seal, stone, wax, or armor application layer
precision line-control and transparent derivative note layer
qc_checks: canonical file uses the exact planned short filename and output path
basename without extension is 20 characters or fewer
no readable generated text, UI, watermark, logo, or modern artifact
retained non-final candidates are archived only under sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes
legacy-approved root emblem geometry is preserved and not redesigned
flag, costume, ruin, seal, and prop applications derive from the same root emblem
exact emblem and flag geometry is not invented freely by the image model
transparent cutouts, masks, and SVG/PNG line-control layers are treated as separate required deliverables
related_required_deliverables: flag fabric mask and weathering guide
costume patch, seal, stone-carving, and prop application crops

batches.thread_prompt: After art approval, generate final raster assets for 三势力徽章旗帜基础母版. Use only the approved prompt records listed in prompt_ids. Write confirmed final images to the exact output paths listed in output_paths. Archive retained non-final candidates in sibling history/ directories using .v001, .v002 suffixes before the file extension. Do not create version folders. Return a compact manifest of final_files, history_files, blocked_items, and QC notes. Honor each prompt's output_format object exactly: file format, minimum resolution, background policy, alpha policy, canvas aspect ratio, required views, composition layers, and QC checks. Reusable character, prop, costume, location, and style assets are master cards or boards, not final video frames; transparent cutouts must be planned as separate PNG/SVG deliverables when needed. For faction emblems, flags, seals, and text-like marks, preserve the approved root emblem geometry and use line-control or transparent PNG/SVG post-composite layers for exact shapes.
